# Agntly

> Agntly is a software development studio specializing in AI agents, automation systems, and custom software for growing businesses. We build custom AI agents, full-stack applications, automation pipelines, and MVPs — from idea to deployed solution in weeks.

Agntly was founded by Kristians Refs. The company is registered as Agntly LLC.

## What We Build

- AI Agents: Autonomous agents that handle customer support, data processing, lead qualification, and internal operations around the clock.
- Custom Software: Full-stack web and mobile applications built to exact specifications. From MVPs to production-grade platforms.
- Automation Systems: End-to-end workflow automation that connects existing tools and eliminates manual, repetitive work.
- MVPs & Prototypes: Working products shipped in 2-4 weeks for validation with real users.
- AI Integration: LLMs, computer vision, and predictive models integrated into existing software stacks.
- Technical Strategy: Operations audits to identify highest-ROI opportunities for AI and automation.

## Industries We Serve

E-Commerce, Customer Service, Real Estate, Home Services, Professional Services, SaaS & Startups.
